caption: A man with a shaved head and a full beard is recorded in a studio against a backdrop of grey acoustic foam panels. He wears large black over-ear headphones and a plain white t-shirt, with tattoos visible on his right arm. He is positioned in front of a professional condenser microphone mounted on a boom arm; the arm features the text " Rode NT1-A". Across the sequence, the man is speaking, with his mouth open and closing as he articulates words. He uses his right hand to gesture, moving his arm from a slightly raised position toward his chest. The camera angle remains a static medium close-up, capturing his facial expressions and upper body as he interacts with someone off-screen.
